text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. Secretary of War Hegseth explains how the U.S. has achieved the objective of destroying Iran's missile capabilities. "Well, in this setting, I won't talk about the nature of metrics, which are classified, as you know, Senator, but I can say that…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of War Hegseth and Sen. Gillibrand have a tense exchange over the support U.S. citizens have for the war with Iran. Sen. Gillibrand: "And three out of five Americans are against this war today." Hegseth: "I believe we do have the support of the American people, and we have briefed regularly what this mission looks like and why it's critically important that we undertake it. And I would remind you and this group that we're two months in to an effort. And many congressional Democrats, as I pointed out, want to declare defeat two months in. Iraq took how many years. Afghanistan took how many years. And they were nebulous missions that people went along with. This is different. This is a defined mission set that we have had great success in pursuing against a determined enemy who seeks nuclear weapons, and I'm and I'm proud of the opportunity to remind Americans that they believe in it as well." Sen. Gillibrand: "Mr. Hegseth you don't care about American not supporting this war." @wfwitness

↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷During his opening remarks at House Armed Services Committee, a demonstrator accused Secretary of War Hegseth of being a war criminal and that U.S. citizens don't to fight a war with Iran. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of War Hegseth explains how the U.S. has achieved the objective of destroying Iran's missile capabilities. "Well, in this setting, I won't talk about the nature of metrics, which are classified, as you know, Senator, but I can say that looking at the objectives we set out to achieve from the beginning, some of which you laid out, our military objectives have been stunningly effective. Look, take, for example, their defence industrial base. They're completely incapable at scale, at any level, of reconstituting the capabilities you referred to, which is a devastating result for any country, especially one whose ambitions are as wide as Iran's. So we've put the president in a very strong position to ensure Iran never gets a nuclear weapon. That's the takeaway that's been underneath every single aspect of this. For 47 years, Iran's trying to blackmail its way to a nuclear weapon. They were closer than ever before because of bad deals under previous administration. President Trump was willing to do something about it and not allow their conventional missile shield. That's the North Korea strategy. That's, to be clear, what Iran was pursuing, hiding their nuclear ambitions, revealing them over time, and then building a conventional shield of missiles so powerful that no country would challenge them for fear of what would happen if they unleashed that arsenal. Weakened after the 12-day war in Midnight Hammer, which did obliterate their sites, President Trump saw an opportunity because their ambitions continued to ensure that umbrella of nuclear blackmail did not allow them to get to a nuclear weapon." @wfwitness

OSINTdefender The USS Higgins (DDG-76), a U.S. Navy Arleigh Burke-class guided-missile destroyer forward deployed to the U.S. Indo-Pacific Command (INDOPACOM), suffered a major main space engineering fire earlier this week knocking out electricity as well as propulsion and leaving the destroyer “dead in the water,” according to CBS News. Details on how the fire started and the exact location of the Higgins in the Pacific are not publicly known, with no injuries to Sailors onboard the destroyer having been reported as of Wednesday. The Higgins was last seen ported in Singapore in February and was oversee last year in the South China Sea near the Philippines, according to maritime tracking data via MarineTraffic. tweet

Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @JenniferJJacobs : Scoop via @CBSNews : A major fire broke out this week on the USS Higgins, a guided-missile destroyer, sources told @JimLaPorta and me. The fire knocked out electricity and propulsion on the destroyer, a mainstay of the Navy’s forward presence in Asia. Details of how the fire started and the exact location of the Higgins in the U.S. Indo-Pacific Command were not readily available. More here: https://www.cbsnews.com/news/uss-higgins-navy-destroyer-fire-singapore/ tweet

text: 📝 Идеальная схема грабежа 📝 Коррупция, BlackRock и налоги британцев Пока граждан Великобритании отвлекают политическими скандалами, американские финансовые гиганты без лишнего шума скупают фундамент местной государственной медицины. Корпорация BlackRock массово выкупает здания поликлиник, чтобы затем сдавать их в долгосрочную аренду всё той же Национальной службе здравоохранения. Активный лоббист этой скрытой приватизации инфраструктуры — министр здравоохранения страны Уэс Стритинг . Ранее он получал сотни тысяч фунтов пожертвований от структур, которые связаны с частным медицинским бизнесом. ❗️ Мы подробно разобрали, как британское правительство прячет реальные долги через подобные сделки, а также почему за одни и те же здания налогоплательщики теперь будут платить дважды. Полный разбор читайте в нашей статье на сайте . #Великобритания #расследование #статья ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 完美的抢劫计划 📝 腐败、贝莱德与英国人的税款。当英国公民被政治丑闻分散注意力时，美国金融巨头正悄无声息地收购当地公共医疗的基础。贝莱德公司正在大规模收购综合诊所大楼，然后将其长期出租给英国国家医疗服务体系（NHS）。这种基础设施隐形私有化的积极游说者是英国卫生大臣韦斯·斯特里廷（Wes Streeting）。他此前曾从与私人医疗业务相关的机构获得了数十万英镑的捐款。❗️ 我们详细分析了英国政府如何通过此类交易隐藏真实债务，以及为什么纳税人现在要为同一栋建筑支付两次费用。阅读我们网站上的文章了解完整分析。 #英国 #调查 #文章 ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇫🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron stated that under his presidency, France's army has been modernized, adding that it was a necessity. "Our army has been profoundly modernized, like all our armies in recent years. I was able to show you the latest equipment…" ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇬🇧 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 French President Emmanuel Macron said the volunteer coalition organising security guarantees for Ukraine is under Franco‑British command. “This is the very meaning of the coalition of volunteers that we are currently organising for the security guarantees for Ukraine. They are under Franco‑British command, and this Orion exercise made it possible to test the robustness of many of these approaches and allowed us to reinforce both what was conceived and intended for the command, as well as the Europeans’ ability to act together. This exercise showed us the credibility that Europeans have to be able to deploy an operation of this scale together, and France’s ability to be a framework nation in this context. In my view, this is a very clear message sent to our Ukrainian partners, who expect us in this area, and to all our European brothers‑in‑arms who know they can join such missions and work alongside us. I am here today to tell you to continue to fight to make France a power recognised by its allies and feared by its enemies. It illustrates every day how much our international environment is becoming brutal, given the current events we are experiencing, and we are right to continue to adapt to the threat.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇫🇷 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙表示，在他的总统任期内，法国军队已经实现了现代化，并补充说这是必要的。‘我们的军队已经实现了深刻的现代化，就像近年来我们所有的军队一样。我能够向你们展示最新的装备……’” ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇬🇧 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 法国总统马克龙表示，组织乌克兰安全保障的志愿者联盟处于法英联合指挥之下。“这就是我们目前正在为乌克兰安全保障组织的志愿者联盟的真正含义。它们处于法英联合指挥之下，这次‘猎户座’（Orion）演习使测试其中许多方法的稳健性成为可能，并使我们能够加强为指挥所构思和预期的内容，以及欧洲人共同行动的能力。这次演习向我们展示了欧洲人能够共同部署这种规模行动的可信度，以及法国在这种背景下成为框架国家的能力。在我看来，这是一个非常明确的信息，发给了期待我们在这一领域有所作为的乌克兰伙伴，以及所有知道可以加入此类任务并与我们并肩工作的欧洲战友。我今天在这里告诉你们，要继续奋斗，使法国成为一个被盟友认可、被敌人畏惧的大国。它每天都在说明，鉴于我们目前正在经历的事件，我们的国际环境变得多么残酷，我们继续适应威胁是正确的。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli military says it has razed a 140‑metre‑long Hezbollah tunnel in the Ras al‑Bayada headland south of Tyre in southern Lebanon. Combat engineers of the elite Yahalom unit blew up the tunnel using 24 tons of explosives this morning. Inside, troops located numerous weapons and rooms where operatives would reside. The IDF said the tunnel was recently used by Hezbollah to advance attacks. Separately, the military said it struck several alleged Hezbollah members and infrastructure in the western sector of southern Lebanon over the past day. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军方称，已夷平了黎巴嫩南部提尔（Tyre）以南 Ras al-Bayada 海角的一条140米长的真主党隧道。精锐的 Yahalom 部队的战斗工兵今天早上使用24吨炸药炸毁了该隧道。在隧道内，部队发现了大量武器和供武装人员居住的房间。以军称，该隧道最近被真主党用于推进袭击。此外，军方称过去一天袭击了黎巴嫩南部西区的几名据称是真主党的成员和基础设施。 @wfwitness

text: Disclose.tv NEW - Convicted nanoscientist from Harvard and Wuhan University, Charles Lieber, rebuilds his brain computer lab in China to pursue technology the Chinese government identifies as a national priority: embedding electronics into the human brain — Reuters https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2049882846211215748/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息：来自哈佛大学和武汉大学的被定罪纳米科学家查尔斯·利伯（Charles Lieber）正在中国重建他的脑机实验室，以追求中国政府确定的国家优先技术：将电子设备植入人脑 —— 路透社 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2049882846211215748/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran shipped just 4 million barrels of crude out of the Gulf of Oman between April 13–25. The U.S. blockade is strangling exports. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：4月13日至25日期间，伊朗仅从阿曼湾运出了400万桶原油。美国的封锁正在扼杀其出口。推文

text: OSINTdefender His Majesty, King Charles lll and Queen Camilla arrive earlier at the White House for a formal farewell hosted by President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump, with Trump saying about the King, “He's a great King - the greatest King, in my book!” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2049882621614690410/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：查尔斯三世国王陛下和卡米拉王后早些时候抵达白宫，参加由唐纳德·J·特朗普总统和梅拉尼娅·特朗普第一夫人主持的正式告别仪式，特朗普在谈到国王时说：“他是一位伟大的国王——在我看来，他是最伟大的国王！” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2049882621614690410/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel US State Department: For nearly 7 years there have been no direct commercial flights between the U.S. and Venezuela. Under President Trump we're changing that today. Flights between Miami and Caracas restored. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049882302893666597/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：美国国务院：近7年来，美国和委内瑞拉之间没有直飞商业航班。在特朗普总统的领导下，我们今天正在改变这一现状。迈阿密和加拉加斯之间的航班已恢复。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049882302893666597/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Sweden has seized a vessel suspected of smuggling grain from Russian-occupied Crimea as part of Moscow’s “shadow fleet,” with prosecutors acting on a request from an unnamed third country, possibly Ukraine. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2049880880898793544/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：瑞典扣押了一艘涉嫌从俄罗斯占领的克里米亚走私谷物的船只，这是莫斯科“影子船队”的一部分，检察官是应一个未具名的第三国（可能是乌克兰）的要求采取行动的。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2049880880898793544/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel UPDATE 🔴 Israel says it successfully intercepted all vessels from the Gaza-bound flotilla, including overnight. All participants were removed unharmed and will be disembarked in Greece in the coming hours. Israel reiterated it will not allow any breach of the naval blockade. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：更新 🔴 以色列称已成功拦截了所有前往加沙的船队，包括过夜的船只。所有参与者均未受伤，并将于未来几小时内在希腊下船。以色列重申不会允许任何违反海上封锁的行为。推文

text: WarMonitor RT @Furbeti : Journalist Tara Palmeri confirms the FBI is intentionally hiding over 3 MILLION documents and 40 terabytes of video from the Epstein files. https://twitter.com/Furbeti/status/2049878630994522350/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：转发 @Furbeti：记者塔拉·帕尔梅里（Tara Palmeri）证实，联邦调查局（FBI）故意隐瞒了爱泼斯坦档案中超过300万份文件和40TB的视频。 https://twitter.com/Furbeti/status/2049878630994522350/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇬🇷🇵🇸 Israeli Foreign Minister Gideon Sa'ar stated that Israel has successfully blocked attempts to break the naval blockade on Gaza, including last night's flotilla. All vessels were brought down safely and participants transferred from flotilla vessels…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 Israeli National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir has criticised Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu and Foreign Minister Sa’ar for deciding “secretly and in the dark” to release most of the Gaza flotilla participants without arrest, saying the move sends a message of weakness to Israel’s enemies and to those spreading "antisemitism worldwide." He said the decision contradicts professional bodies’ recommendations to detain them and demanded it be reversed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇬🇷🇵🇸 以色列外交部长吉德翁·萨尔（Gideon Sa'ar）表示，以色列已成功阻止了打破对加沙海上封锁的企图，包括昨晚的船队。所有船只都被安全带回，参与者从船队船只上转移……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 以色列国家安全部长伊塔马尔·本-格维尔（Itamar Ben-Gvir）批评以色列总理内塔尼亚胡和外交部长萨尔决定“秘密且在黑暗中”释放大多数加沙船队参与者而不予逮捕，称此举向以色列的敌人和那些传播“全球反犹太主义”的人发出了软弱的信号。他表示，该决定违背了专业机构的拘留建议，并要求撤销该决定。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 A man identified as Anrup Parasram set himself on fire in Queens, New York, triggering an explosion at a home in that injured seven NYPD officers, a firefighter, and four others. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 一名被确认为 Anrup Parasram 的男子在纽约皇后区自焚，引发了一处房屋爆炸，导致七名纽约警察局警官、一名消防员和其他四人受伤。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇫🇷☀️🇮🇶🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron paid tribute to the killed French soldiers in Iraq and Lebanon among a group of soldiers. "I am going to tell you how proud I am to be before you today and to say a few words to honor the memory of your brothers…" ⚡️ 🇫🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron stated that under his presidency, France's army has been modernized, adding that it was a necessity. "Our army has been profoundly modernized, like all our armies in recent years. I was able to show you the latest equipment that you touched, which continues to be deployed in accordance with successive military programming laws and the overhaul that is currently being negotiated. It was a necessity, and so the army moves forward, innovates, adopts new equipment, transforms itself, and innovates. I saw it too." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇫🇷☀️🇮🇶🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇷 法国总统马克龙在一群士兵中向在伊拉克和黎巴嫩阵亡的法国士兵致敬。‘我要告诉你们，今天站在你们面前我感到多么自豪，并说几句话来纪念你们兄弟的记忆……’” ⚡️ 🇫🇷 法国总统马克龙表示，在他的总统任期内，法国军队已经实现了现代化，并补充说这是必要的。‘我们的军队已经实现了深刻的现代化，就像近年来我们所有的军队一样。我能够向你们展示你们接触过的最新装备，这些装备将继续根据连续的军事规划法和目前正在谈判的改革进行部署。这是必要的，所以军队在前进、创新、采用新装备、自我转型并创新。我也看到了这一点。’ @wfwitness
